project_type: Next.js 16.2.4 App Router with React 19, in-memory database
build_system: bun (bun.lock present, npm scripts defined but npm not available in sandbox). Use bun run build / bun run lint.
test_framework: No test framework installed - use build and lint for verification
verification_instructions: 1. Run bun run build to confirm TypeScript compilation and Next.js build succeed. 2. Run bun run lint to confirm no lint errors.
environment_constraints: npm not available - use bun. Node.js not directly available - use bun. No test runner installed. OPEN_INTERNET network mode. AGENTS.md warns about Next.js version differences - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ if needed.
contribution_requirements: Follow AGENTS.md: read relevant guide in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code. Heed deprecation notices.
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive. Server actions in lib/actions.ts use requireSession() for auth. Database is in-memory via lib/db.ts. Medications have an id, user_id, name, reminder_times, last_taken_date. MedicationLog has medication_id, medication_name, taken_at, date. toggleMedication action marks as taken and calls createMedicationLog. Components use responsive Tailwind CSS with dark mode. Semantic HTML with aria attributes throughout.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages and components. app/components/ - client components. app/api/ - API routes. lib/ - server utilities (db, actions, types, auth, timezone). public/ - static assets.
